授業方法:
Please check Teams for asynchronous class materials.


This course is primarily lecture-based; however, students are expected 
to participate actively in pair and group discussions during each class 
session.

教科書/Required texts1: What Should Every EFL Teacher Know?
参考書/Reference books2: The Twenty Most Effective Language Teaching Techniques
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy andcurriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.▪General Foundation Courses (Basic Courses):1. Understanding and analytical skills regarding international issues: the ability to understand and analyze various regions of the world from different perspectives in the humanities and social sciences.

成績評価Grading3: 備考　Note 																							As a general rule, the credits will not be granted to students who miss more than one-third of the class sessions.Classes will be conducted using the textbook and online materials; therefore, please bring the textbook and a PC to each class.
